title: Project Lightwell brings open source security into the AI era
summary: IBM and Red Hat launched Project Lightwell, a $5 billion initiative to secure open source software using AI-augmented engineers and a trusted security clearinghouse. The project aims to protect the open source ecosystem, which powers over 90% of Fortune 500 companies but is vulnerable to cyberattacks.
